title: plectranthus secundiflorus
intro: Plectranthus secundiflorus, also known as the 'Purple Fountain Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Plectranthus secundiflorus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
